description: Shopify Admin onboarding cez Dev Dashboard client credentials; automatizuje token exchange, scope verify, local env, Vercel a Storefront smoke.

steps.title: Release a nainštaluj GrowMedica Nexus app
actions: Release app version with all required scopes
Install app or Update access in GrowMedica Slovakia
Copy Client ID and Client secret into secure server env

steps.title: Token exchange, scope verify, .env.local, Vercel and smoke
steps.success_when: exit_code === 0 && report.credential_mode === 'client_credentials' && report.admin_api === 'ok' && report.admin_scopes === 'ok' && report.env_local === 'ok' && report.vercel === 'ok' && report.storefront_smoke === 'ok'

credential_exchange_failed.message: Over Client ID/Secret a inštaláciu appky.

403_api_disabled.message: Release/install app alebo Update access v obchode.

missing_scopes.message: Release verziu so všetkými required scopes a potvrď Update access.

api_version_fallback.message: Shopify obslúžil inú verziu než requested; pinni podporovanú API verziu a zopakuj celý verify.

steps.title: Nexus server-side client credentials
rules: Exchange client credentials only on the server
Do not persist the transient Admin token in browser config or Vercel env
Run Test connection and keep S8 pending until it passes

agent_protocol: Prefer SHOPIFY_CLIENT_ID + SHOPIFY_CLIENT_SECRET from secure env or .env.local
Treat legacy shpat as fallback only
Do not change storefront UI or design tokens
Require separate confirmation before a live write or bulk apply
